Trivera Finserve Limited — Data Export Approval & DPA Schedule (India DPDPA / PIT Code)
Scope: Processing of client onboarding records (KYC contact, masked PAN), trade confirmations, and employee login logs; Aadhaar and full PAN not stored; child data (under 18) not onboarded.
Legal basis: consent for marketing; legitimate uses for compliance and contracts; no reliance on implied consent for sensitive identifiers.
Minimisation: forms labeled “Aadhaar / PAN / GSTIN (optional)” are either disabled for retail clients or captured as redacted tokens (e.g., PAN hash), not in raw form.
Retention: onboarding files 5 years; access logs 18 months; marketing preferences until withdrawal; auto-deletion schedules tested and not paused.
Insider controls: processors receive no unpublished price-sensitive information; this memo refers only to publicly announced Q4 results and generic workflow steps.
Negative assurance: no leak, breach, or sharing of UPSI is occurring or proposed; domestic exchange listing rules are observed under the company’s Insider Trading Code.
Children’s data: we avoid collecting data of persons under 18; any inadvertent capture triggers suppression and erasure workflow without saving Aadhaar.
Cross-border transfer approval (positive): on 2026-05-31, export of masked employee directory to Cloudoora Data Services Pte. Ltd., Singapore, was approved with encryption-at-rest, contractual safeguards, and DPDPA-compliant purpose limitation.
Transfer exclusions: no Aadhaar, full PAN, or live client trading data will be included; only role, office alias email (e.g., ops@triverafinserve.example), and hashed employee IDs.
DSAR and consent withdrawal handling (positive): on 2026-05-15, we completed a data principal request to delete marketing contact details and confirm opt-out, with audit log retained per law.
Processor terms: subprocessors must notify us of any change, not export data further without written approval, and follow India-origin security standards; no onward transfer is scheduled.
Security summary: encryption in transit, access via role-based controls, and segregation of trading and corporate networks; completed controls should not be read as current incidents.
Contacts: privacy requests via dpo@triverafinserve.example; grievances will be handled per the Digital Personal Data Protection Act grievance redressal timelines.
